event_summary: Hydraulic pressure initially decreased after isolation but later rebounded because an isolation valve was leaking. A second pressure observation was required before maintenance.
corrective_action: Require time-series observation of pressure decay to detect rebound.
lesson: Always observe pressure over time to ensure isolation is complete and not leaking.

event_summary: Maintenance was attempted with a raised ram without a mechanical safety block installed.
corrective_action: Enforce physical verification of mechanical block when ram is raised.
lesson: Never rely solely on hydraulic pressure to hold a raised ram during maintenance.

event_summary: Incorrect breaker-lock photograph submitted as evidence.
cause: Confusion over which breaker controlled the machine.
corrective_action: Implement AI-assisted or dual-person verification of lock placement.
lesson: Visual evidence must clearly identify the correct isolation point.

event_summary: Try-start verification omitted before commencing work.
corrective_action: Make try-start verification a mandatory checklist item.
lesson: Try-start is the final definitive check that energy is isolated.

event_summary: Pneumatic workpiece-clamp pressure overlooked during isolation.
corrective_action: Include auxiliary pneumatic systems in the main LOTO procedure.
lesson: All energy sources, even secondary ones, must be isolated.
